tagline: Build a shared masterpiece, one moment at a time.

designSystem.style: Bold geometric with asymmetric grid layouts, thick 2px borders, geometric accent blocks, strong typographic hierarchy using Poppins 800 for headings, role-colored badges, and a mosaic tile visualization system

keyFeatures: Daily Prompt Drops with role-based prompts
Interactive Mosaic tile grid with progressive reveal simulation
Crew Interpretations Feed with like/comment interactions
Role selection system (Analyst, Synthesizer, Illustrator, Catalyst, Architect)
